# hush_gcp_integration (Resource)

Manages a Hush Security GCP integration for scanning GCP projects for secrets and sensitive data.

Set `service_account_email` to complete the integration with the GCP service account created by the onboarding module.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "hush_gcp_integration" "example" {
  name        = "my-gcp-integration"
  description = "GCP integration for scanning secrets"

  # Complete the integration with service account from onboarding module
  service_account_email = module.hush_gcp_onboard.service_account_email

  features {
    name    = "secret_manager"
    enabled = true
  }

  features {
    name    = "iam"
    enabled = true
  }

  projects {
    project_id = "my-gcp-project"
    enabled    = true
  }
}

# GCP onboarding module creates service account and IAM bindings
module "hush_gcp_onboard" {
  source  = "hushsecurity/onboard/gcp"
  version = ">= 1.1.0"

  hush_org_id                = "org-xxxxxxxxxxxx" # Your Hush org ID
  gcp_organization_id        = "123456789012"     # Your GCP org ID
  service_account_project_id = "my-gcp-project"   # Project for service account
  project_ids                = ["my-gcp-project"] # Projects to scan
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the GCP integration

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the GCP integration
- `features` (Block List) List of GCP features to enable (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--features))
- `projects` (Block List) List of GCP projects to scan (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--projects))
- `service_account_email` (String) The GCP service account email for Hush to impersonate. Required to complete the integration.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the GCP integration
- `status` (String) The current status of the integration

<a id="nestedblock--features"></a>
### Nested Schema for `features`

Required:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this feature is enabled
- `name` (String) The feature name (secret_manager, gcs_tf_state, artifact_registry, iam)

Read-Only:

- `state` (String) The current state of the feature
- `state_message` (String) Additional details about the feature state


<a id="nestedblock--projects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `projects`

Required:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether scanning is enabled for this project
- `project_id` (String) The GCP project ID

Read-Only:

- `display_name` (String) The display name of the GCP project
- `organization_id` (String) The GCP organization ID associated with the project
- `state` (String) The current state of the project within the integration
- `state_message` (String) Additional details about the project state
